title: Enhanced Vanilla Experience
body:
**Have an old computer? Low performance on most games but still want to play minecraft? or want to play a vanilla+ pack with no performance cost?**
Well the ✨ **Enhanced Vanilla Experience** ✨ modpack is all about making Minecraft more fun, exciting, and immersive aswell as preformance optimized. It brings a bunch of new features and improvements, client side and server side, that make the game feel fresh while still keeping the core gameplay intact.



This modpack adds more and better structures, more immserive sounds, better netherite, and even combat rolls (press r) among alot more.


![text saying "enhanced Vanilla experience" with enhanced vanilla experience outlined in white   on a black backround](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc946f49ad00d982541c1a69e99167561071189a_0.webp)
